html:
Exclusive to:

“Reduces hunger by 25%. Periodically Spawns Mushroom Spores.”

-

The Funcap is a craftable item exclusive to Don't Starve Together, introduced in A New Reign. There are three variants, crafted from, and matching, various Mushrooms' colors. They can be crafted after obtaining their Rare Blueprint by either killing the Toadstool or as a random drop from Loot Stash, after killing Klaus, using 6 Mushroom Caps with the same color.

Funcaps can be equipped in the head slot. When worn, they reduce the rate of Hunger loss by 25%, provide 20% Wetness resistance and 60 points of protection from Overheating. They also periodically spawn Mushroom Spores every 60-61 seconds, which can be caught using a Bug Net. Like Garlands, they perish over time whether they are worn or not. They take 6 Days to completely spoil.

Perishable items stored within the player's inventory while a Funcap is equipped will spoil 50% faster, this also applies to equipped items, including the Funcap itself. Items stored within Backpacks remain unaffected.

Usage

×4

Tips

  • Funcaps can be given to pigs or bunnymen, resulting in them wearing the caps and thus spawning spores. This can give enough spores to have multiple glowcaps lit up and you can just use your everyday pig farm to generate the spores.

Trivia

  • Funcaps were added in the Warts and All update.
  • An icon for an unimplemented green Mushroom Hat could be found in the game files, before Funcaps were added to the game.

Gallery

“Makes the wearer look like a fun guy.”
–Wilson
“I don't like having my head messed with.”
–Willow
“Is mushy-room... for head!”
–Wolfgang
“If I'm lucky, it'll be poisonous.”
–Wendy
“WHIMSICAL ORGANIC CAMOUFLAGE”
–WX-78
“Ooo. What a delightfully wizened look.”
–Wickerbottom
“That there'll make you one with the forest.”
–Woodie
“It possesses a spritely magic.”
–Maxwell
“This helm runs flush with the förest's magic!”
–Wigfrid
“It's a cap cap!”
–Webber
“Wearing mushrooms is the next best thing to eating them.”
–Warly
“Haha! Friend hat!”
–Wormwood
“Really?”
–Winona
“I'll have mushroom spores in my horns for days.”
–Wortox
“Keeps head nice and clammy!”
–Wurt
“It's not made of the poisonous kind, right?”
–Walter
“I don't like the idea of a mushroom growing on my head.”
–Wanda
“Reduces hunger by 25%. Periodically Spawns Mushroom Spores.”
-
The Funcap is a craftable item exclusive to Don't Starve Together, introduced in A New Reign. There are three variants, crafted from, and matching, various Mushrooms' colors. They can be crafted after obtaining their Rare Blueprint by either killing the Toadstool or as a random drop from Loot Stash, after killing Klaus, using 6 Mushroom Caps with the same color.
Funcaps can be equipped in the head slot. When worn, they reduce the rate of Hunger loss by 25%, provide 20% Wetness resistance and 60 points of protection from Overheating. They also periodically spawn Mushroom Spores every 60-61 seconds, which can be caught using a Bug Net. Like Garlands, they perish over time whether they are worn or not. They take 6 Days to completely spoil.
Perishable items stored within the player's inventory while a Funcap is equipped will spoil 50% faster, this also applies to equipped items, including the Funcap itself. Items stored within Backpacks remain unaffected.
Usage[edit | edit source]
×4
Tips[edit | edit source]
Funcaps can be given to pigs or bunnymen, resulting in them wearing the caps and thus spawning spores. This can give enough spores to have multiple glowcaps lit up and you can just use your everyday pig farm to generate the spores.
Trivia[edit | edit source]
Funcaps were added in the Warts and All update.
An icon for an unimplemented green Mushroom Hat could be found in the game files, before Funcaps were added to the game.

Periodically Spawns Mushroom Spores.}} The '''Funcap''' is a craftable [[item]] exclusive to ''[[Don't Starve Together]]'', introduced in ''[[A New Reign]]''. There are three variants, crafted from, and matching, various [[Mushroom]]s' colors. They can be crafted after obtaining their Rare [[Blueprint]] by either killing the [[Toadstool]] or as a random drop from [[Loot Stash]], after killing [[Klaus]], using 6 Mushroom Caps with the same color. Funcaps can be equipped in the head slot. When worn, they reduce the rate of [[Hunger]] loss by 25%, provide 20% [[Wetness]] resistance and 60 points of protection from [[Overheating]]. They also periodically spawn [[Mushroom Spore]]s every 60-61 seconds, which can be caught using a [[Bug Net]]. Like [[Garland]]s, they perish over time whether they are worn or not. They take 6 [[Day]]s to completely spoil. Perishable items stored within the player's inventory while a Funcap is equipped will spoil 50% faster, this also applies to equipped items, including the Funcap itself. Items stored within [[Backpack]]s remain unaffected. == {{pic|32|Icon Tools}} Usage== {{Recipe |item1 = Moon Shroom |count1 = 4 |item2 = Red Funcap |tool = Celestial Altar |result = Lunar Funcap }} =={{Pic32|Prototype}} Tips== * Funcaps can be given to [[Pig|pigs]] or [[Bunnyman|bunnymen]], resulting in them wearing the caps and thus spawning spores. This can give enough spores to have multiple [[Mushroom Lights#Glowcap|glowcaps]] lit up and you can just use your everyday pig farm to generate the spores. == {{pic|32|Placeholder}} Trivia == * Funcaps were added in the ''[[A New Reign#September 23rd, 2016 - Warts and All|Warts and All]]'' update. * An icon for an unimplemented green Mushroom Hat could be found in the game files, before Funcaps were added to the game. {{clear}} == {{Pic32|Blueprint}} Gallery == Blue Funcap Equipped.png|Blue Funcap Equipped Green Funcap Equipped.png|Green Funcap Equipped Red Funcap Equipped.png|Red Funcap Equipped Mushroom Hat.png|An icon for an unimplemented green Mushroom Hat could be found in the game files, before Funcaps were added to the game.
